summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SuperNetworkAI platform. Backend has 2 critical API failures (opportunity creation, messaging), but core functionality works. Frontend UI/UX is excellent with successful authentication flow, search, and navigation.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error due to MongoDB ObjectId serialization issue
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks opportunity creation - core feature unavailable

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error due to MongoDB ObjectId serialization issue
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks messaging system - core feature unavailable

authentication_issues.issue: Some endpoints work without authentication when they should require auth

passed_tests: Landing page loads with animated particles and gradient text
Get Started Free button and Sign In button work (redirect to OAuth)
API root endpoint returns correct info
Opportunities list endpoint works (returns empty array)
Authentication /api/auth/me works correctly with session token
Ikigai profile creation and retrieval works
People search with AI matching works perfectly
Ikigai onboarding wizard works (4-step process visible)
All protected pages accessible with valid session
Search integration works with AI-powered results and match scores
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix critical MongoDB ObjectId serialization errors in opportunity creation and messaging endpoints. Review authentication middleware to ensure all protected endpoints properly require auth tokens.
